source: current upstream litex-boards through local toolchain passthrough patch and LiteX -nolutram patch
blocker: LiteX generated PRJXRAY packer commands with part xc7k480t-ffg1156-2, but the PRJXRAY database uses xc7k480tffg1156-2.
timing_note: nextpnr routed the design under --timing-allow-fail; crg_clkout_buf0 reached about 107.69 MHz against a 200 MHz target in the following successful rerun.
next_decision: Patch only the PRJXRAY packer part spelling by removing the first hyphen for xc7 parts and rerun DDR3-only.
